sections.name: Ch2 2
sections.text:
Introduction
Part I: The Journey
Chapter 1: Finding My Path
 How a kid with average grades stumbled into crypto and found his purpose.
Chapter 2: From Designer to Investor
 Transitioning from freelance work to building in the blockchain ecosystem.
Chapter 3: Understanding Value
 Why traditional finance is rigged, and how crypto creates opportunities.
Chapter 4: The Money Mindset
 Building the psychological foundations for wealth when you start with nothing.
Chapter 5: Navigating Chaos
 How I learned to see patterns in the madness of emerging markets.
Chapter 6: The Squirrel Philosophy
 Why forest animals are better investors than Wall Street pros.
Chapter 7: Hidden Wisdom
 The counterintuitive principles that changed my approach to risk and reward.
Chapter 8: Carve Your Own Path
Explains why readers need to develop their own strategies
Chapter 9: Practical Application
 Real examples of putting these principles to work in volatile markets.
Part II: The Strategy in Action
Chapter 10: Positioning for Impact
 Setting the stage for my first major wins in the crypto space.
Chapter 11: Breaking Seven Figures
 The key decisions and lucky breaks that led to my first million.
Chapter 12: The Scale-Up Challenge
